title: EU countries rush to avoid disastrous revision of Russian oil price cap
content: If ambassadors fail to agree on the sanctions by 15 July, the price cap on Russian oil will be automatically revised, going all the way up to $58 per barrel, a scenario that Brussels considers unpalatable.

title: Burnham on course to become next UK PM with 322 Labour MPs backing him in first vote
content: If Burnham reaches at least 323 nominations then it would no longer be mathematically possible for another challenger to get the 81 signatures required to join the race out of the total of 402 Labour MPs.

title: 'I'm not a candidate': Lagarde tells Euronews as French election speculation grows

title: March for peace in memory of the victims of the Srebrenica genocide

content: Tough talks on the EU’s next long-term budget, Ukraine’s push for EU accession and skyrocketing fertiliser costs are putting European farmers under the political spotlight once more. title: Portuguese rapper jailed in Germany for drug trafficking is deported to Portugal
content: Ivo Vieira Silva, better known as rapper 18 Karat, was deported early on Wednesday. Sentenced in Dec 2022 to six years and three months, he will remain free in Portugal, but any return to Germany would mean immediate arrest to serve the rest of his term.

title: Newly released footage shows revolver gifted by Erdogan to NATO leaders
content: Images shared by the Lithuanian Presidency show a revolver given by Turkey's Erdogan to every NATO leader as a parting gift after the summit in Ankara.
